ogTitle: Padstow Heights vs Pagans Flat: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Padstow Heights and Pagans Flat.
heading: Padstow Heights vs Pagans Flat — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Padstow Heights, New South Wales and Pagans Flat, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Padstow Heights has a lower overall climate risk score (30/100) compared to Pagans Flat (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Padstow Heights or Pagans Flat safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Padstow Heights has a flood risk score of 23/100, while Pagans Flat scores 42/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Padstow Heights scores 15/100 for bushfire risk. Pagans Flat scores 42/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Padstow Heights or Pagans Flat?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Padstow Heights has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.28% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
